title: Extract wave computation into reusable package
description:
Extract the wave computation logic from tk graph (cmd/tk/cmd/graph.go) and computeMaxWaveWidth (cmd/tk/cmd/run.go) into a new internal/wave/ package.

The package should expose:
- Wave struct: { Number int, Tasks []tick.Tick }
- ComputeWaves(epicID string, tasks []tick.Tick) []Wave
- Uses Kahn's algorithm on BlockedBy relationships
- Filters to open, non-awaiting tasks only
- Returns waves in execution order

This is the same algorithm already in graph.go lines 175-225 and run.go lines 1171-1250, just extracted into a shared package that both tk graph and the new engine can use.
acceptance_criteria: internal/wave/ package exists with ComputeWaves(). tk graph uses it. Unit tests cover: linear deps, parallel tasks, diamond deps, cycles, mixed awaiting/open tasks.
closed_reason: Extracted wave computation to internal/wave/ package with tests.
